title: Barát-Thomassen Conjecture
statement_text: For any tree $T$ on $m$ edges, there exists an integer $k_T$ such that every $k_T$-edge-connected graph with size divisible by $m$ has a $T$-decomposition.
context_text: Barát and Thomassen observed in 2006 that $T$-decompositions are intimately related to nowhere-zero flows, motivating this conjecture. Prior to this paper, the conjecture had been verified only for stars, some bistars, paths, and trees of diameter at most 4.
paper_contribution: Proves the full statement of the conjecture for every tree $T$, completely settling it in the affirmative.
paper_title: A Proof of the Barát-Thomassen Conjecture
